component.name: Clipman
component.summary: Clipboard history manager for Wayland (GNOME, KDE, Sway, Hyprland)

description.p: Clipman is a clipboard history manager for Wayland (GNOME, KDE, Sway, Hyprland). Press Super+V to view your clipboard history, search entries, pin favorites, and instantly paste previous copies — like Windows Win+V, but for Linux.

ul.li: Clipboard history with text and image support
Full-text search across all entries
Pin important entries to keep them permanently
Inline editing and preview expansion
Incognito mode to pause history recording
Sensitive data detection with auto-clear
URL detection with one-click open
Reusable text snippets
Dark and light themes (Catppuccin)
Database backup and restore
Reusable text snippets with template variables (${date}, ${time}, ${clipboard})
wl-clipboard fallback for non-GNOME compositors (KDE, Sway, Hyprland)
16 carefully designed edge states (incognito, sensitive auto-clear, first-run, errors)
Terminal-aware paste (Ctrl+Shift+V)

description.p: GTK 3 to GTK 4 + libadwaita port and Catppuccin palette overlay.

ul.li: Popup rebuilt as Adw.ApplicationWindow with Adw.HeaderBar and Adw.ActionRow rows
Settings extracted into a dedicated Adw.PreferencesWindow with six panes
Snippets editor is now an Adw.NavigationSplitView master-detail dialog
16 edge states (empty, no-results, incognito, sensitive-cleared, first-run, errors) render through Adw.StatusPage, Adw.Banner, and Adw.AlertDialog
Catppuccin Mocha and Latte palettes applied as overrides on libadwaita's named-color tokens
No D-Bus contract, schema, or settings-key changes; existing history and preferences carry over

description.p: Catppuccin theme polish, snap-store auto-publish workflow, popup stability fixes.
Sensitive-data detection improvements and refreshed Catppuccin palettes.
D-Bus interface tightening and small popup bug fixes.

ul.li: Added wl-paste --watch fallback when GNOME Shell extension is absent
Clipman now works on any Wayland compositor (KDE, Sway, Hyprland, etc.)
Automatic crash recovery for the watcher subprocess
Hardened backup import against SQLite URI injection and malicious triggers
Added image magic bytes validation
Extended sensitive data detection patterns

description.p: Patch release with clipboard reliability fix.

ul.li: Fixed unreliable clipboard detection with 150ms debounce
Fixed D-Bus slot name in Snap packaging
Added screenshots and donation URL to AppStream metadata
Clipboard history with text and image support
GNOME Shell extension for native Wayland clipboard detection
Incognito mode, sensitive data auto-clear, inline edit
URL detection, snippet manager, backup/restore
Terminal-aware paste and cursor-positioned window
XWayland clipboard support (VSCode, Electron apps)
